# Blanc's Music Studios

Blanc's Music Studios is a family-run music studio in Thornhill, Ontario, serving families in Thornhill, Richmond Hill, Markham, North York, Vaughan, and the Greater Toronto Area.

Website: https://andymaker156.github.io/suzuki/
Phone: 905-731-5336
Email: jean_blanc@icloud.com
Address: 21 Thorne Lane, Thornhill, Ontario L3T 5K6, Canada

## Teachers

- Jean (John) Blanc: Suzuki violin teacher. Trained at the University of Bucharest. Member of SAO, SAA, and ISA. Chairman of the Beethoven Society for Pianists.
- Rose-Marie Blanc: Suzuki piano teacher. Trained at the University of Bucharest. Musical Director of the Beethoven Society for Pianists. Known as Music Director and Founder of the BAPS Suzuki Program.

## Programs

- Suzuki violin lessons for young children
- Suzuki piano lessons for young children
- Combined piano and violin family study
- RCM preparation
- Ukulele and guitar options for children when appropriate
- Flexible, student-specific music study designed to support long-term interest

## Teaching Style

The studio emphasizes a kind, patient, encouraging Suzuki learning environment. Lessons are child-centred and can be customized to the student's age, confidence, goals, and interests.

## Community And Credibility

Rose-Marie and Jean Blanc are identified in public materials as founders of the Beethoven Society for Pianists, Greater Toronto Chapter. The Society supports young musical talent in the Greater Toronto Area through concerts, scholarships, workshops, masterclasses, and Stars of Tomorrow activity.

Public references:

- Jean Blanc LinkedIn: https://ca.linkedin.com/in/jean-blanc-52901227
- Beethoven Society founders: https://www.beethovensocietytoronto.ca/about
- Beethoven Society programs: https://www.beethovensocietytoronto.ca/programs
- Beethoven Society events: https://www.beethovensocietytoronto.ca/events
- Canadian Sinfonietta bios: https://canadiansinfonietta.com/community-chamber-concerts/
- Allison Leyton-Brown bio: https://www.allisonleytonbrown.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/06/Bio-Website-2016.pdf
- Lumiere Solitaire dedication listing: https://www.sheetmusicplus.com/en/product/lumiere-solitaire-romantic-piano-solo-by-allison-leyton-brown-20106236.html
